author: vvo
subject: v1.5.2
body: ## [1.5.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.5.1...v1.5.2) (2016-06-10) ### Bug Fixes * **lite:** use lite algoliasearch build (js client) ([219fa9f](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/219fa9f)), closes [#1024](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1024) * **poweredBy:** Let users define their own poweredBy template ([f1a96d8](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f1a96d8))
